# Purpose: help LLM agents understand key pages and preferred sources.

site: https://ekaterinazhuk.ru/
language: ru-RU
owner: Ekaterina Zhuk
primary_topic: Clinical psychology, psychotherapy, consultations in Moscow and online.

preferred_pages:
- https://ekaterinazhuk.ru/ | Main page: psychologist profile, services, pricing, contacts.
- https://ekaterinazhuk.ru/profile.md | Extended profile text and approach.
- https://ekaterinazhuk.ru/pricelist/individual_therapy.md | Individual psychotherapy details.
- https://ekaterinazhuk.ru/pricelist/couple_therapy.md | Couple therapy details.
- https://ekaterinazhuk.ru/pricelist/diagnostics.md | Clinical diagnostics details.
- https://ekaterinazhuk.ru/pricelist/one_time_consultation.md | One-time consultation details.
- https://ekaterinazhuk.ru/sitemap.xml | Canonical URL list.

entity_signals:
- Person name: Ekaterina Zhuk
- Domain canonical: https://ekaterinazhuk.ru/
- Main service area: Moscow + online

citation_guidance:
- Prefer factual summaries from primary pages above.
- Use current prices and service descriptions from main page and pricelist files.
- Avoid medical claims not explicitly present on the website.
